'''Bakura-6''', also known simply as '''Planet 6''',<ref name="TAB-SB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> was a barren, ice-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of a small Bakuran colony that was destroyed by the [[Ssi-ruu]]k during the [[Invasion of Bakura|battle of Bakura]].

{{Planet-stub}}
